reviews.comment:
Mala atención! Otros clientes y yo entramos al revés (nuestra culpa, aunque no esta bien señalizado) pero había 4 personas en la playa para 2 surtidores. ¿No nos van a poder decir antes de que nos acomodemos y nos bajemos de los autos?
Y para avisar después 🤦‍♂️ ("he loco lo tenes que dar vuelta").
Dedíquese a otra cosa.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service! Other customers and I entered the wrong way (our fault, even though it's not well signposted), but there were four people on the pumps for two pumps. Couldn't they have told us before we got settled and out of the cars?

And to tell us afterward 🤦‍♂️ ("Hey man, you have to turn it around").
Find something else to do.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfLU5fSkFREAE
